The Pagan gods are in Scripture described as having “ eyes, but they see not,” but this God has no eyes , let alone seeing ; “ ears have they, out they bear not,” but this God has no ears ; . “ hands have they, but they handle not,” but this God has no hands; “ feet have they, but they walk not,” but this God has no feet 1 !
